name: Mega Man
description: Capcom's action-platforming franchise about robot heroes, weapon copying, stage selection, and precise boss-driven design.

eras.title: Classic Era
eras.description: Original Robot Master formula across NES, SNES, Saturn, and PlayStation.

eras.title: X and Spin-off Expansion Era
eras.description: Expansion into X, Zero, ZX, Legends, Battle Network, and Star Force branches.

eras.title: Legacy Revival Era
eras.description: Retro sequels, collections, and selective new entries.
